flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Western New Mexico University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.6k → $7.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Western New Mexico University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (18.9% → 15.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Western New Mexico University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Western New Mexico University rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 2.0k).
